name: Iranian Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced red or green bell pepper
1 cup Mixed fresh herbs (parsley, mint, tarragon, basil, chives)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine diced carrots, cabbage, Japanese eggplant, cucumber, onions, garlic, bell pepper, celery, and mixed fresh herbs in a large bowl.
2. Add salt and mix well.
3. Pour red wine vinegar over the mixture and stir until evenly coated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 25 days before using. If eggplant is omitted, the relish will be ready to use in 3 or 4 days.
5. Serve with bread or as desired. Traditionally served with meats.
